message:
Reduce full-screen flicker by rendering only changed rows

Replace the brute-force clear-and-redraw approach in Program::render()
with a row-by-row diff against the previous frame. Only lines that
actually changed get rewritten via MoveTo + Clear(CurrentLine), which
dramatically cuts terminal I/O on high-frequency updates like spinner
ticks and streaming token deltas.

- Split old and new views into lines, compare pairwise
- Skip identical rows entirely (no cursor movement or write)
- Clamp row index to u16::MAX for MoveTo safety
- Trim trailing \r before comparison to avoid false diffs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
